name: io.github.mdvohra/agent-godmode
title: agent-godmode
description: MCP server and library: read/write files, run commands, list files — with strict prompts for user-provided LLMs.

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_GODMODE_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Absolute workspace root; only paths under this directory are allowed. Omit if you pass --root to the CLI.
